transcript: Uh, this is Hooter callin’. How’s it goin’? I’m new 'round here.—
Okay, good, Hooter. Ya know what, I— I don’t have time to talk to you but, uh… have a great day and please don’t— I’m in the middle of installing a dishwasher.—
Well hey, I got your number from— up at the news stand. Guy’s a friend of mine up 'ere. [exhales]
No, I—I—I know, I like all that too, but, uh… I— I’m really— I can’t talk to you right now. I’m the wrong guy, anyways.—
I’m from Mummy Mountain. Ya know, I had to pump the brakes up 'ere, so that’s why I’m new 'round here.—
Okay, good! Well, the— Yeah— Unwrap the Mummy and, uh… I know the gig. The gig’s up, I mean, so… [laughs] You have the wrong guy!—
Check— Just check it out real quick. I’m comin’ around to install Christmas lights up ’n down the street, m’kay? So don’t fret—
…if you hear me rustlin’ around, okay? [delay]
No problem! But— Install 'em. But, um, I—
[laughing] I know— I know who you are, so… the thing is, it’s like the—
The gig’s up. You’re supposed to be getting my brother, not me… So, uh…—
Mike, I’ll leave a… information sheet about payment ’n everything—for the Christmas lights, okay?—so I don’t bother you any further, alright? So you can remit payment that way.—
Alright, love ya! Have a great day!
Not gonna be a problem. Just send a payment when ya see what I do with the lights, okay? [delay]—
[(sample of?) automated market research survey plays]
Thank you for participating in our Customer Experience Survey!
Question 1: How likely would you be to recommend UPS to a friend or colleague? Enter a number between "0" and "10" (with "0" meaning "Not at all likely" and "10" meaning "Extremely likely").
Please make a selection.["Question 1" prompt repeats]
Oh! Oh! Well it’s not— it’s not— it’s not le— It’s not lettin’ me make a selection! Every time I hit the pad it goes black! What do I do?!

For the next question, we will be using a scale between "1" and "5" (with "1" meaning "Strongly disagree" and "5" meaning "Strongly agree"). Question 2: I would choose to interact with the same representative the next time I contact UPS. Please enter a number between "1" and "5".
Ugh! Oh! Strongly wouldn’t wanna use this person!—
Please make a selection.["Question 2" prompt repeats]

No, somebody’s screwing with our telephone lines. They— They cross… They cross different people’s numbers and they call… two or three people at the same time and everybody thinks they’ve been called and… It’s just somebody having fun at our expense.
It’s not U—? It’s not U—? It’s not UPS?
